description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-seater sofa upholstered in a teal blue fabric. The sofa features broad, straight armrests that are the same height as the backrest, creating a clean, geometric silhouette. The seat and back cushions are thick, plush, and appear to be loose but fit snugly within the frame, providing a comfortable seating area. The upholstery has a subtle, fine-textured weave that adds visual interest while maintaining a solid color. The sofa sits on short, block-style legs that are only slightly visible, giving it a low-profile appearance. Its overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern teal blue two-seater sofa with straight, broad armrests and plush, loose cushions, featuring a subtle textured fabric and a low-profile design.
description_view_0: The back of the sofa is visible, showing a solid, uninterrupted teal fabric surface with the tops of two back cushions slightly protruding.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions, emphasizing the sofa's boxy profile.
description_view_2: The front view displays two large seat and back cushions, broad armrests, and the inviting, plush seating area.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the straight armrest and the sofa's overall depth and structure.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all uniform in size and snugly fitted within the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, rectangular profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible and likely made of dark wood or metal, giving a recessed appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose back cushions, continuous and unsegmented, no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid teal blue fabric with a subtle, fine-textured weave and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
